data.title: Consolidated Lithium Metals discovers new Li-bearing pegmatite and secures financing for exploration campaign at Preissac Project.
data.description: Consolidated Lithium Metals Inc. has officially started its summer 2025 exploration campaign at the Preissac Project. The company, listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol CLM and FRA as Z36, shared this positive development on July 4, 2025. No specific details about the scope or investment in the campaign were provided.

data.title: Petro-Victory Energy and Azevedo & Travassos Energia signed a binding MOU on July 2, 2025.
data.description: On July 2, 2025, Petro-Victory Energy Corp. (TSXV: VRY) and Azevedo & Travassos Energia S.A. ("ATE") signed a significant memorandum of understanding (MOU). The MOU outlines a partnership between the two companies for future endeavors. Petro-Victory is a prominent company in the energy sector, listed on the Toronto Stock Venture Exchange. The agreement signifies a key step for both parties in enhancing their operations and strategic goals.

data.title: BTC's failed attempt at $110K signals risk for bulls; $112K resistance strong, while numerous support levels stand.
data.description: Following the release of robust US employment data, the Bitcoin price surge halted at $110,000, encountering considerable resistance. The $112,000 mark now poses a significant barrier for further advancement, while multiple support levels lie beneath to cushion any potential downturns.

data.title: Phoenix FIRE investors claim exit scam as owner Daniel Ianello seeks dismissal of lawsuit in Tennessee court.
data.description: Daniel Ianello is seeking the dismissal of a lawsuit in Tennessee which alleges his involvement in an exit scam following his acquisition of a cryptocurrency project.
